mapper.update: MERGE INTO FWK_USER_WORK_TASK target USING (SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuId} AS MENU_ID FROM DUAL) source ON (target.USER_ID = source.USER_ID AND target.MENU_ID = source.MENU_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET WORK_GROUP_ID = #{workGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, MENU_ID, WORK_GROUP_ID, TASK_ORDER, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES (#{userId}, #{menuId}, #{workGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId})
